evidenceSummary.summary: Doc-trigger harvest is well represented in feature catalog/manual/test surfaces for flag gating, skill_docs lifecycle, capped scoring, matchedDocs, and flag-off invariance.
Sanitizer catalog wording is broad, but inspected anchors do not specifically cover raw doc-frontmatter fields written to skill_docs.
Dedicated automated tests cover public matched-doc path sanitization, scoring caps, and lifecycle, but not malicious title/description/trigger_phrases storage/readback sanitization.
Adjacent sanitizer tests cover graph metadata and affordance attribution, so the remaining gap is narrow to doc-frontmatter skill_docs raw fields.
